creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 156422
svn patch to 0.6.4

The attached svn patch updates audio/ncmpcpp to version 0.6.4. This is just another small bugfix release without any major changes. Changes to the port are:

- Bump PORTVERSION to 0.6.4
- Update distinfo

Changes to the application are:

- Fix title of a pop-up which shows during adding selected items to the current playlist.
- Correctly deal with leading separator while parsing filenames in tag editor.
- Fix initial incorrect window size that was occuring in some cases.
- Unknown and invalid configuration options can now be ignored using command line option 'ignore-config-errors'.

The port was tested with Poudriere in a FreeBSD 10.1 jail.
